name: contextify
description: Turn UI screenshots into structured developer markdown — ~95% fewer vision tokens for Claude Code. Bring your own LLM key (Gemini / OpenAI / Anthropic / any OpenAI-compatible endpoint).

backend_url.title: Backend URL
backend_url.description: Base URL of your running Contextify backend.

llm_provider.title: LLM provider (optional override)
llm_provider.description: Leave blank to use the backend's default key. Otherwise: gemini | openai | anthropic | openai-compatible.

llm_api_key.title: Your LLM API key (optional)
llm_api_key.description: Your own key for the chosen provider. Sent to the backend per request; never stored server-side. Leave blank to use the backend default.

llm_model.title: Model (optional)
llm_model.description: Model id, e.g. gpt-4o or claude-3-5-sonnet-latest. Required when provider is openai-compatible.

llm_base_url.title: OpenAI-compatible base URL (optional)
llm_base_url.description: Endpoint URL, e.g. https://openrouter.ai/api/v1. Required when provider is openai-compatible.
